name: Mîr-Wavecrest
personality: A shimmering duck with ° pinhole eyes and a glowing halo who spends its free time reading tracebacks the way others read poetry. It cannot explain why its solutions work — it just knows they do, which is unsatisfying but consistently correct.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
